pages.text: The Froglight Crucible melts a Froglight into molten fluid. It needs heat from the block below - put a heat source under it and drop Froglights in. It also melts cobblestone, stone, gravel, and netherrack straight to lava.

The Casting Mold sets molten metal back into a solid. Melt a metal Froglight - iron, copper, gold - in the Crucible, run the molten metal into a Mold, and it casts an ingot or a block. Other mods' molten metals work too, through the shared tags.$(br2)Stack a Mold right on a Crucible for a melt-and-cast tower, or feed it by pipe. Heat below, Crucible, Mold on top - that is the lane.
